title: grave and head
description: There would built a grave when you die,and it will tell you the pos of your grave.And it will drop the heads when the player,wither and warden be killed
body:
When the players die, there would built a grave to store their items and xp at the death point,and then tell the little poor the pos of the grave.If die in void, the grave can built at y=2 point, so don't worry about your items. By the way, you would lost some xp, not too much.

When the wither, warden and player were killed,they would drop their heads.

Have fun!
